text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I've no doubt that I made every effort I could in
preparation. I held nothing back during the race
either.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Perhaps it's that my light remains too faint...
choice_data_list: Let's figure out a way to win, together!
You just need to get stronger.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. Please do provide me with all the
knowledge and wisdom you can.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I shall redouble my efforts, so please continue to
advise me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...!
...Yes, you're absolutely correct. Although I
exhausted my strength, there was still quite a gap
between me and the competition.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps I should have trained more, but I do not
wish to use my health as an excuse.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I shall fully devote myself to winning the next
race, so please continue to support my efforts.
